---
title: "AstroEsteban"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/astroesteban
    - icon: twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/astroesteban
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/estebanduran
---

## About Me

Hola, I'm Esteban Duran 👋

I am a spacecraft software engineer and all around space geek. I am a first-gen
Mexican-American originally from space city, Houston. I am interested and
currently working on spacecraft autonomy and flight software for a variety
of missions. More specifically, I am interested in exploring how artificial
intelligence can make our spacecraft more capable so that we may explore deeper
and further into the cosmos. This blog is intended to be an outlet for discoveries and musings
spacecraft autonomy, flight software, and any other tools which interest me.

## My Journey

**Senior Flight Software Engineer**, _Emergent Space Technologies_, 2020-Present

**Flight Software Engineer**, _Firefly Aerospace_, 2018-2020

**Artificial Intelligence Engineer Intern**, _NASA's Johnson Space Center_, 2018

**Autonomous Systems Engineer Intern**, _NASA's Stennis Space Center_, 2016
